title: [CODEREVIEW] schema.json does not support format_version 2 for ccp15.json
description: test_vector_file_schema parametrized test excludes ccp15.json and schema const=1 while ccp15 uses 2. Also no definition for ccp vectors with snr_ema, load_factor, expected_sf, hash_32_example fields. Impacts Python/vectors/tests consistency. discovered-from:1vgs la5m
